name: Classic Creamy Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 medium cucumber, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes in a large pot and cover with salted cold water by 1 inch. Bring to a boil, then cook until just tender when poked with a knife.
2. Drain the potatoes and allow them to cool. Cut into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mash the eggs with a fork. Add mayonnaise, sour cream, mustard, white wine vinegar, and sugar; stir to combine.
4. Season with tabasco sauce, salt, and pepper to taste. Stir in the potatoes, cucumber, scallions, and parsley.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
